title: 392 drones and 34 missiles: Massive Russian barrage of strikes kills 5 across Ukraine
summary_full: Russia unleashed a significant overnight assault, deploying hundreds of drones and missiles across Ukraine, resulting in at least five fatalities and widespread damage. Critical energy infrastructure was hit, impacting power links to Europe. This escalation follows Ukrainian warnings of impending large-scale attacks, with both nations reporting intensified cross-border strikes recently.
